title: CRITICAL: ThemeProvider not exported from library entry point
description: C3: The README tells users to `import { Button, Card, ThemeProvider } from 'vanguard-emboss-uikit'` but ThemeProvider lives in src/providers/theme-provider.tsx and is NOT exported from src/components/ui/index.ts — the library's sole entry point. Every new user following README gets a TypeScript/build error immediately.
resolution: Added ThemeProvider and useTheme exports to index.ts with proper import path
